since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.68%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC +0.63% · Gold +1.43% · Nasdaq100 +0.80%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.68%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.68%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +10.31%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +10.31%, LRCX +8.90%, TER +8.13%, KLAC +8.09%, MU +6.87%. Laggards: IBM -5.30%, WDAY -4.70%, CRM -4.67%, NOW -4.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.13% at $149.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
